MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Wall Comapny is present. Represented by Elizabeth Hanson.
Attorney, John Granucci, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Art Cottrell, is present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem C. Zadik Shapiro, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-20-2010 is vacated.
